description: This pipeline performs a complex series of image processing operations, including filtering, thresholding, and morphological transformations, to enhance and analyze biomedical images. It begins by importing images and applying initial processing steps, such as smoothing and contrast adjustment, followed by more advanced techniques like edge detection, watershed transformation, and local variance calculation. The pipeline also includes nodes for annotating images, slicing data, and converting image types, ultimately producing a refined output that highlights specific features of interest in the original images.

76b3a39a-ee91-48c3-9ffc-02473965d66b.name: ij1-contrast-illumination-correction2d
76b3a39a-ee91-48c3-9ffc-02473965d66b.description: Applies a Gaussian filter to the image and extracts the maximum value. Pixel values are then divided by this value.If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

8dd21b6b-f66c-4066-b5da-835fa5eed1c6.name: ij1-blur-gaussian3d
8dd21b6b-f66c-4066-b5da-835fa5eed1c6.description: Applies convolution with a Gaussian function in 3D space for smoothing. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 3D slice.

970bb8d4-fb16-4bbb-b632-53aca6ced488.name: image-properties-to-annotation
970bb8d4-fb16-4bbb-b632-53aca6ced488.description: Adds data annotations that contain the image properties.

9365364d-d46f-469b-9bbf-8690672c2b61.name: ij1-threshold-auto2d
9365364d-d46f-469b-9bbf-8690672c2b61.description:
Applies an auto-thresholding algorithm. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

d70fbbf7-5afd-49ac-8c5e-b2b132a06910.name: ij1-blur-gaussian3d
d70fbbf7-5afd-49ac-8c5e-b2b132a06910.description: Applies convolution with a Gaussian function in 3D space for smoothing. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 3D slice.

80c4f828-fe53-4fc9-8060-07746aa62c5b.name: ij1-blur-median2d
80c4f828-fe53-4fc9-8060-07746aa62c5b.description: Applies a median filter. If a multi-channel image is provided, the operation is applied to each channel. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

73af0425-25e4-4e30-bbce-2a0bc6df9565.name: ij1-blur-gaussian3d
73af0425-25e4-4e30-bbce-2a0bc6df9565.description: Applies convolution with a Gaussian function in 3D space for smoothing. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 3D slice.

72aa90c7-8459-4ba9-b1b5-5241e9d30e01.name: ij1-blur-gaussian2d
72aa90c7-8459-4ba9-b1b5-5241e9d30e01.description: Applies convolution with a Gaussian function for smoothing. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

16c84c9a-8590-4662-b374-75387229dad6.name: ij1-contrast-clahe
16c84c9a-8590-4662-b374-75387229dad6.description: Applies 'Contrast Limited Adaptive Histogram Equalization' (CLAHE) to enhance contrast. Composite color images are converted into their luminance. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the results are generated for each 2D slice.

8f0b63f1-7f1c-4ea6-8462-8c0c4b3ccea4.name: ij1-morph-binary-fillholes2d
8f0b63f1-7f1c-4ea6-8462-8c0c4b3ccea4.description: Applies a morphological hole filling operation to binary images.If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

55f00b09-07d3-4a02-8b3b-968a8e194674.name: path-to-annotation-simple
55f00b09-07d3-4a02-8b3b-968a8e194674.description: Creates an annotation for each path based on its name or its full path.

d05e50ce-6389-4cd7-a461-a92bdb7af957.name: ij1-blur-gaussian3d
d05e50ce-6389-4cd7-a461-a92bdb7af957.description: Applies convolution with a Gaussian function in 3D space for smoothing. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 3D slice.

ee33a2d1-0319-45be-9ac9-fd46a6debce0.name: image-properties-to-annotation
ee33a2d1-0319-45be-9ac9-fd46a6debce0.description: Adds data annotations that contain the image properties.

c154dce2-67c5-4fe3-a6c7-01d1d3d66e68.name: data-slicer
c154dce2-67c5-4fe3-a6c7-01d1d3d66e68.description: Slices the incoming data table into a smaller table with a limited row set according to the selected row.

410d264d-d3de-413a-af64-ba13fed0f380.name: ij1-background-rollingball2d
410d264d-d3de-413a-af64-ba13fed0f380.description: Finds or subtracts the background of a 2D slice via a rolling-ball or paraboloid algorithm. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

29229d78-943c-419c-8280-3b2b49f73d7a.name: ij1-binary-dtwatershed2d
29229d78-943c-419c-8280-3b2b49f73d7a.description: Applies an euclidean distance transform on binary images. Then applies a watershed algorithm.If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

5f2b5d54-998b-40fc-ace3-53352d4b13cc.name: ij1-convolve-convolve2d-parameter
5f2b5d54-998b-40fc-ace3-53352d4b13cc.description: Applies a convolution with a user-defined filter kernel. The kernel is defined by a parameter.If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice. For the most precise results, we recommend to convert the image to 32-bit before applying a convolution. Otherwise ImageJ will apply conversion from and to 32-bit images itself, which can have unexpected results.

2899bf7d-a616-414d-baf8-c807b1ab3560.name: import-imagej-bioformats
2899bf7d-a616-414d-baf8-c807b1ab3560.description: Imports images via the Bio-Formats plugin

2dc0e25f-ff7e-4184-b6be-8ac4bbdf6286.name: ij1-math-hessian2d
2dc0e25f-ff7e-4184-b6be-8ac4bbdf6286.description: Deprecated: Replace with node with the same name. Computes Hessian the eigenvalues of the Hessian, which can be used for example to discriminate locally between plate-like, line-like, and blob-like image structures.If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

922687ec-a08e-413c-99a7-b9596d114fd7.name: ij1-blur-gaussian3d
922687ec-a08e-413c-99a7-b9596d114fd7.description: Applies convolution with a Gaussian function in 3D space for smoothing. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 3D slice.

Applies an auto-thresholding algorithm. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

ab21e96c-8dc0-4b9e-9f9e-ad23b3ecbb59.description: Converts each provided path into folder data.

a7c4a8b8-5789-44d4-891e-9eb815d81fc1.name: ij1-edge-sobel
a7c4a8b8-5789-44d4-891e-9eb815d81fc1.description: Applies a Sobel edge detector. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

f426fe52-7a30-4f44-93da-fff470638dbd.name: ij1-noise-removeoutliers2d
f426fe52-7a30-4f44-93da-fff470638dbd.description: Filter that replaces pixel values by the median if they deviate too much from it. If a multi-channel image is provided, the operation is applied to each channel. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

a582d9a4-9180-4277-960a-aa3bf3e0bb51.name: ij1-math-hessian2d
a582d9a4-9180-4277-960a-aa3bf3e0bb51.description: Deprecated: Replace with node with the same name. Computes Hessian the eigenvalues of the Hessian, which can be used for example to discriminate locally between plate-like, line-like, and blob-like image structures.If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

425c71f6-c8e6-4e09-9b07-dbe0d48a2e1e.name: ij1-math-hessian2d
425c71f6-c8e6-4e09-9b07-dbe0d48a2e1e.description: Deprecated: Replace with node with the same name. Computes Hessian the eigenvalues of the Hessian, which can be used for example to discriminate locally between plate-like, line-like, and blob-like image structures.If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

dd471e45-0317-4245-8d35-2d3ebdb1e9d6.name: image-properties-to-annotation
dd471e45-0317-4245-8d35-2d3ebdb1e9d6.description: Adds data annotations that contain the image properties.

744adcc8-b766-4e74-beca-41ea5abaedf0.name: data-slicer
744adcc8-b766-4e74-beca-41ea5abaedf0.description: Slices the incoming data table into a smaller table with a limited row set according to the selected row.

8a66d877-b5c0-4fb5-9469-d6f5beed01d1.name: ij1-noise-removeoutliers2d
8a66d877-b5c0-4fb5-9469-d6f5beed01d1.description: Filter that replaces pixel values by the median if they deviate too much from it. If a multi-channel image is provided, the operation is applied to each channel. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

bdef6906-fa8f-47d5-ba56-92f8fd574cc5.name: ij1-morph-operation2d
bdef6906-fa8f-47d5-ba56-92f8fd574cc5.description:
Applies a morphological operation to greyscale images. Following operations are included: Erosion, Dilation, Opening, Closing, White Top Hat, Black Top Hat, Gradient, Laplacian, Internal Gradient, and External Gradient. More information (including examples) can be found at https://imagej.net/MorphoLibJ.html
If a multi-channel image is provided, the operation is applied to each channel. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

22a0db0d-f1c1-4b14-8ee6-bc59d2c143f5.name: ij1-threshold-auto2d
22a0db0d-f1c1-4b14-8ee6-bc59d2c143f5.description:
Applies an auto-thresholding algorithm. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

1f234adb-c7d5-451c-8851-ddfb8e15b785.name: ij1-threshold-auto2d
1f234adb-c7d5-451c-8851-ddfb8e15b785.description:
Applies an auto-thresholding algorithm. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

908669ce-0713-4865-a4a5-31782b477cfa.name: ij1-threshold-auto2d
908669ce-0713-4865-a4a5-31782b477cfa.description:
Applies an auto-thresholding algorithm. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

f02a69ab-5a4e-43ae-8450-1c28d755b715.name: ij1-math-local-variance3d
f02a69ab-5a4e-43ae-8450-1c28d755b715.description: Calculates the local variance around each pixel. If a multi-channel image is provided, the operation is applied to each channel. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 3D slice.

b7c1b866-23f6-4ebc-9df1-5513a0f912b1.name: ij1-transform-set-dimensions
b7c1b866-23f6-4ebc-9df1-5513a0f912b1.description: Sets the exact hyperstack dimensions of the incoming images. If you provide a lower size, planes will be removed. If you provide a larger dimension, planes are either set to black or copied from the slices with the highest index.

1307341d-8b22-462c-a02d-c383855ed98c.name: image-properties-to-annotation
1307341d-8b22-462c-a02d-c383855ed98c.description: Adds data annotations that contain the image properties.

954fc80e-8175-4a56-9e2e-156de453d61f.name: ij1-binary-dtwatershed2d
954fc80e-8175-4a56-9e2e-156de453d61f.description: Applies an euclidean distance transform on binary images. Then applies a watershed algorithm.If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

29cbb6f5-1ffc-4b77-98bb-1573321b104f.name: path-to-annotation-simple
29cbb6f5-1ffc-4b77-98bb-1573321b104f.description: Creates an annotation for each path based on its name or its full path.

85604ceb-8504-4827-a5a1-530c933dcc30.name: folder-list-files
85604ceb-8504-4827-a5a1-530c933dcc30.description: Lists all files in the input folder

4f022b89-c657-4dec-b230-4f0aef42e4bf.name: cellpose
4f022b89-c657-4dec-b230-4f0aef42e4bf.description:
Runs Cellpose on the input image. This node supports both segmentation in 3D and executing Cellpose for each 2D image plane. This node can generate a multitude of outputs, although only ROI is activated by default. Go to the 'Outputs' parameter section to enable the other outputs.
  • Labels: A grayscale image where each connected component is assigned a unique value. Please note that ImageJ will run into issues if too many objects are present and the labels are saved in int32. ImageJ would load them as float32.
  • Flows: An RGB image that indicates the flow of each pixel. Convert it to HSB to extract information.
  • Probabilities: An image indicating the probabilities for each pixel.
  • Styles: A vector summarizing each image.
  • ROI: ROI of the segmented areas.
Please note that you need to setup a valid Python environment with Cellpose installed. You can find the setting in Project > Application settings > Extensions > Cellpose.

This algorithm merges all annotations and data annotations. Use the iteration step settings to determine how annotations and data annotations are merged

5e3888a6-b365-4b47-8585-a4cd99881878.name: ij1-convolve-convolve2d-parameter
5e3888a6-b365-4b47-8585-a4cd99881878.description: Applies a convolution with a user-defined filter kernel. The kernel is defined by a parameter.If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice. For the most precise results, we recommend to convert the image to 32-bit before applying a convolution. Otherwise ImageJ will apply conversion from and to 32-bit images itself, which can have unexpected results.

71e4d00c-6931-4af1-beca-e656d9f5f8ce.name: ij1-morph-operation2d
71e4d00c-6931-4af1-beca-e656d9f5f8ce.description:
Applies a morphological operation to greyscale images. Following operations are included: Erosion, Dilation, Opening, Closing, White Top Hat, Black Top Hat, Gradient, Laplacian, Internal Gradient, and External Gradient. More information (including examples) can be found at https://imagej.net/MorphoLibJ.html
If a multi-channel image is provided, the operation is applied to each channel. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

d6860aaf-47ae-410a-89f9-92f93f3374be.name: annotate-split-by-annotation
d6860aaf-47ae-410a-89f9-92f93f3374be.description: Splits the input data by a specified annotation or filters data based on the annotation value.

2e20c4fc-f7e7-4c8f-a012-2f72f83c8c60.name: ij1-threshold-local-auto2d-sauvola
2e20c4fc-f7e7-4c8f-a012-2f72f83c8c60.description: Applies a local auto-thresholding algorithm. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

803747a9-475c-47de-a5db-ff85487f4577.name: ij1-sharpen-laplacian2d
803747a9-475c-47de-a5db-ff85487f4577.description: Applies a 3x3 sharpening filter. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

7963d848-8646-445f-b3ae-0075fe374f39.name: ij1-math-hessian2d
7963d848-8646-445f-b3ae-0075fe374f39.description: Deprecated: Replace with node with the same name. Computes Hessian the eigenvalues of the Hessian, which can be used for example to discriminate locally between plate-like, line-like, and blob-like image structures.If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

72161901-b252-4344-baba-79a35f1c0ddd.name: ij1-threshold-manual2d-16u
72161901-b252-4344-baba-79a35f1c0ddd.description: Thresholds the image with a manual threshold. If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice.

3a4b82b2-9543-4454-a8c5-9b484dfada4c.description: Creates an annotation for each path based on its name or its full path.

Applies a morphological operation to greyscale images. Following operations are included: Erosion, Dilation, Opening, Closing, White Top Hat, Black Top Hat, Gradient, Laplacian, Internal Gradient, and External Gradient.
